entity: 1984-85 NBA Finals: Los Angeles Lakers def. Boston Celtics 4-2 (Kareem's 1st LAL title; first Lakers championship since 1980)
notes: Indexed from the LAL side (1610612747). Kareem Abdul-Jabbar won Finals MVP at age 38, the oldest Finals MVP in NBA history. LAL went 12-4 in the 1985 playoffs, sweeping PHX in round 1 (3-0 sweep, not 4-0), then 4-1 POR, 4-1 DEN, 4-2 BOS.
